text.title: Agentic RAG Iterative Retrieval Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from question class assessment to wired IterativeRetriever.

step.name: confirm-question-class
step.action: Verify multi-hop / synthesis question rate >20% and single-pass-RAG failure rate >20% on those.

step.name: wire-models
step.action: Bind judge_model (haiku/sonnet) and generator_model (opus). Reject same model on both.

step.name: wire-loop
step.action: Build loop: retrieve → dedup by chunk_id → judge → refine → loop. Hard cap at `max_iterations` (≤5).

step.name: wire-drift-gate
step.action: Compute cosine sim between original and refined query embeddings; if <0.7 reset to original.
